name: Baked Cod Livornese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a 10-inch skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté until onion is translucent, about 1 minute.
3. Add mushrooms and cook until they are just tender, about 2 minutes. Stir in wine and bring to a boil.
4. Add tomatoes and seasonings; stir occasionally until the sauce thickens, about 2 minutes.
5. In a shallow 1-quart flameproof casserole, arrange cod fillets and top with sauce. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake until fish flakes easily at the touch of a fork, 15 to 20 minutes.
7. Using a slotted pancake turner, carefully remove fish from the casserole to a serving platter. Keep fish warm.
8. Return casserole to medium heat and cook remaining pan juices until reduced and thickened, about 2 minutes. Pour over fish and sprinkle with parsley.
